description: PKB Starter — Skill installation profiles. Each profile selects a curated subset from the 42-entry skill catalog. Profiles are starting points; skills can be added/removed anytime via skill_manager.py or /project:skills.

core.name: Core
core.description: Zero external skills. Pure PKB Starter with 5 built-in tools: web_pack, pkb_auto, import_to_inbox, sanitize, docs_update. Plus 5 self-built meta skills: git-versioning, secret-scan, document-converter, skill-creator, skill-lint. Ideal for minimalists who want the base PKB workflow.

student.name: Student
student.description: Academic essentials for coursework and paper writing. Literature search + review, paper section writing, citation management, article extraction for research sources. Ideal for undergraduates and coursework-focused grad students.

research.name: Research
research.description: Full research pipeline for graduate students and academics. Deep research + agent research skills, literature tools, experiment design, data analysis, figure/table generation, citation management, peer review tools. Comprehensive academic workflow.

developer.name: Developer
developer.description: Development-focused: document processing for technical docs, semantic code search, project kanban, GitHub research, code debugging. Ideal for software engineers documenting projects and research.

creator.name: Creator
creator.description: Content creation: prompt library, song archive, script breakdown, article extraction, YouTube transcripts. Ideal for writers, musicians, filmmakers, and content creators.

output.name: Output & Publishing
output.description: Output-focused: document conversion, academic writing, slide/presentation generation, figure/table generation, prompt library. For users who primarily produce documents, reports, and presentations.

security.name: Security & Privacy
security.description: Security-hardened: enhanced sanitizer, secret scanning, git versioning with pre-commit checks. Minimal skill set focused on keeping your knowledge base clean of sensitive data. Ideal before sharing or publishing a PKB.
security.note: Built-in sanitize-tool and secret-scan are always active regardless of profile.

full.name: Full Stack
full.description: All recommended skills across all categories. Academic research + document processing + creation + search + project management. The complete PKB power-user setup. Review risk levels before installing.
full.note: Some skills in this profile have risk_level: high or require MCP/external runtimes. Use --enable-risky to install high-risk skills. CNKI and Zotero are NOT included by default.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Interactive selection from the complete 42-entry catalog. Choose exactly which skills to install. Run install_skills.py --profile custom for guided selection.

low.description: Auto-install when selected in profile. No warnings needed.

medium.description: Install but display warnings about external dependencies, token usage, or API requirements.

high.description: Require explicit --enable-risky flag. Display full MCP/runtime/external requirements before install.

reference_only.description: Never install. Displayed as read-only reference in catalog. License unclear or code is proprietary.

install_rules.built_in: Always present in PKB template. No installation needed.
install_rules.template_bundled: Part of PKB template. Copied by install.py automatically.
install_rules.git_clone: Full repo clone to skills/_vendor/<id>/. All sub-skills available.
install_rules.git_clone_selective: Repo cloned to skills/_vendor/<id>/. Only selected sub-skills copied to .claude/skills/.
install_rules.plugin_marketplace: Install via Claude Code plugin marketplace. /plugin marketplace add <repo> then /plugin install <skill>.
install_rules.mcp_config: Configure in .claude/mcp.json. Requires MCP server setup.
install_rules.reference_only: NEVER installed. Listed for design reference only.
